title: Hat making kit and packaging method therefore
abstract: A kit for creating a knitted garment, such as a hat. The kit includes a length of yam, a topper, a stabilizer, and optionally instructions for creating the garment from the yam, topper and stabilizer. A method of packaging the kit is also provided. This disclosure includes a kit for creating a knitted garment, such as a hat. The kit can include yam, a topper, a stabilizer, and optionally instructions for creating the garment from the yam, topper, and stabilizer. In one embodiment, the yam can be a continuous length with at least two segments or at least three segments that can be either different colors or textures or both.
claims: Claims CLAIMS What is claimed is: 1. A kit for creating a knitted garment, the kit comprising: a length of yam; a topper; and a stabilizer. 2. The kit of claim 1, wherein the length of yam comprises a continuous length with at least two segments of different textures. 3. The kit of claim 1, wherein the length of yam comprises a continuous length with at least three segments of different textures. 4. The kit of claim 1, wherein the length of yam comprises a continuous length with at least two segments of different colors. 5. The kit of claim 1, wherein the length of yam comprises a continuous length with at least three segments of different colors. 6. The kit of claim 1, wherein the length of yam comprises a continuous length with at least two segments of different colors and textures. 7. The kit of claim 1, wherein the length of yam comprises a continuous length with at least three segments of different colors and textures. 8. The kit of any one of claims 1 to 7, wherein the length of yam is at least 40 meters. 9. The kit of any one of claim 1 to 8, wherein the topper comprises an ornament and a retentioner. 10. The kit of claim 9, wherein the retentioner comprises at least two straps. 11. The kit of claim 10, wherein the at least two straps comprise a ribbon. 12. The kit of any one of claims 1 to 11, wherein the stabilizer comprises a disk-like shape with at least one through-hole. 13. The kit of claim 12, wherein the stabilizer comprises a foam. 14. The kit of claim 12, wherein the stabilizer is at least one inch in diameter. 15. The kit of claim 12, wherein the stabilizer weighs less than two ounces. 16. The kit of any one of claims 1 to 15, further comprising instructions for creating a knitted garment. 17. The kit of any one of claims 1 to 16, wherein the knitted garment is a hat. 18. A method for packaging a kit of items used to knit a garment, the method comprising: wrapping a yarn into a generally spherical shape placing a wrapper adjacent to the yam such that an aperture through the wrapper generally corresponds with an axis through the middle of the wrapped yam; mounting a topper upon the yam by passing at least a portion of the topper through the aperture of the wrapper and generally though the center of the wrapped yarn; attaching a stabilizer to the wrapper; encircling the yarn with the wrapper; and connecting together the ends of the wrapper to complete the package. 19. The method of claim 18, wherein the wrapper comprises a printed set of instructions. 20. The method of claim 18 or 19, further comprising entrapping a portion of the topper between the ends of the wrapper. 21. A method for creating a knitted garment comprising the steps of: obtaining the kit of any one of claims 1 to 16; using a knitting technique to convert the yarn into the knitted garment; and using the stabilizer to attach the topper to the knitted garment. 22. The method of claim 18, wherein the knitting technique comprises knitting or crocheting. 23. The method of claim 18, wherein the knitted garment comprises a hat.
